instruction: would you give me information about cancelling orders?
context: No specific order referenced — general policy enquiry. Policy guideline: Orders cancelled within 24 hours of placement are eligible for a full refund at no charge. Cancellations made after 24 hours but before shipment incur a $5 admin fee. Orders that have already shipped cannot be cancelled and must go through the returns process. Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days to the original payment method. Agents should always offer to look up a specific order if the customer has one in mind.
response: Of course! Here's how our cancellation policy works: if your order was placed within the last 24 hours, you can cancel it completely free of charge. After 24 hours but before it ships, a $5 admin fee applies. Once an order has shipped, cancellation is no longer possible — but you can return it after delivery and we'll refund you in full. All refunds are processed within 5–7 business days to your original payment method. If you have a specific order in mind, share the order number and I can check its current status and tell you exactly what applies.

instruction: can I use my promo code SAVE20 on top of my loyalty discount for this order?
context: Customer account: Priya Nair. Loyalty tier: Silver (5% discount). Promo code submitted: SAVE20 (20% off entire order — valid, not expired). Cart total before any discount: $142.00. Policy guideline: Loyalty discounts and promotional discount codes cannot be stacked. Only one discount may be applied per order. The customer must be explicitly informed of the conflict and asked to choose which discount they wish to apply. The agent must not make the choice on the customer's behalf, and must not apply both discounts under any circumstances. Agent should calculate and present the final price under each option to help the customer decide.
response: Hi Priya! I can see both your Silver loyalty discount (5%) and your promo code SAVE20 (20%) are valid — but I do need to let you know that our policy only allows one discount per order, so unfortunately they can't be combined. Here's what each option would look like on your $142.00 cart: with your Silver loyalty discount (5%) the total would be $134.90; with promo code SAVE20 (20%) the total would be $113.60. The promo code gives you the better saving in this case, but the choice is entirely yours. Which would you like to apply?
